course.name: production-ready-full-stack-theory
course.title: Production-Ready Full-Stack Development (Theory)
course.description: Architecture-first, production ownership-oriented full-stack theory: runtime semantics, networking/HTTP, caching correctness, backend API engineering, frontend delivery/performance, accessibility, toolchains, reliability, testing, data & distributed systems, and optional AI—ending with a complete senior architecture packet and incident simulation.
course.author: Anonymous
